title: Corymbia bloxsomei
taxonomy: Corymbia bloxsomei is classified in the family Myrtaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as myrtles. This family includes over 150 genera and more than 6,000 species. Within the Myrtaceae family, Corymbia bloxsomei is part of the genus Corymbia, which consists of around 113 species of eucalyptus trees. The genus Corymbia is further divided into several subgenera, but the specific classification of Corymbia bloxsomei within these subgroups is not well-documented. More research is needed to determine the exact classification of Corymbia bloxsomei.
